goal: is_galois_connection[A, B](lower, upper) = forall(x0: A, x1: B) { lower(x0) <= x1 = x0 <= upper(x1) }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { x2 <= x0(x3) = x1(x2) <= x3 } = is_galois_connection[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[A, B](upper, lower)
(forall(x0: A, x1: B) { x0 <= upper(x1) = lower(x0) <= x1 } = true)
function(x0: A) { forall(x1: B) { x0 <= upper(x1) = lower(x0) <= x1 } = true }(a)
function(x0: A, x1: B) { lower(x0) <= x1 = x0 <= upper(x1) }(a, b)
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 <= x2 or x0(x1) <= x0(x2) } = is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](lower)
let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: A) { w0 <= k0 and not lower(w0) <= lower(k0) } }
let w1: A satisfy { w0 <= w1 and not lower(w0) <= lower(w1) }
let w2: A satisfy { w0 <= w2 and not lower(w0) <= lower(w2) }
function(x0: A, x1: A) { not x0 <= x1 or lower(x0) <= lower(x1) }(w0, w2)
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 <= x2 or x0(x1) <= x0(x2) } = is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) }[B, A](upper)
let w0: B satisfy { exists(k0: B) { w0 <= k0 and not upper(w0) <= upper(k0) } }
let w1: B satisfy { w0 <= w1 and not upper(w0) <= upper(w1) }
let w2: B satisfy { w0 <= w2 and not upper(w0) <= upper(w2) }
function(x0: B, x1: B) { not x0 <= x1 or upper(x0) <= upper(x1) }(w0, w2)
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T0) { galois_closure[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x1(x0(x2)) }[A, B](lower, upper, a)
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T1) { galois_kernel[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[A, B](lower, upper, b)

goal: galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, a) <= galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, b)

proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 <= x2 or x0(x1) <= x0(x2) } = is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) }[A, A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper))
let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: A) { w0 <= k0 and not galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, w0) <= galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, k0) } }
let w1: A satisfy { w0 <= w1 and not galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, w0) <= galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, w1) }
let w2: A satisfy { w0 <= w2 and not galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, w0) <= galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, w2) }
function(x0: A, x1: A) { not x0 <= x1 or galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, x0) <= galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, x1) }(w0, w2)

goal: galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, a) <= galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, b)

proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 <= x2 or x0(x1) <= x0(x2) } = is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) }[B, B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper))
let w0: B satisfy { exists(k0: B) { w0 <= k0 and not galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, w0) <= galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, k0) } }
let w1: B satisfy { w0 <= w1 and not galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, w0) <= galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, w1) }
let w2: B satisfy { w0 <= w2 and not galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, w0) <= galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, w2) }
function(x0: B, x1: B) { not x0 <= x1 or galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, x0) <= galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, x1) }(w0, w2)

not upper(lower(c)) <= upper(lower(a))

c <= upper(lower(c))
not upper(lower(c)) <= c
upper(lower(upper(lower(a)))) != c
upper(lower(upper(lower(a)))) = c

goal: galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, a)) = galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, a)
proof: upper(lower(upper(lower(a)))) = upper(lower(a))

lower(upper(c)) <= c
not c <= lower(upper(c))

lower(upper(lower(upper(b)))) = c

goal: galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, b)) = galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, b)
proof: lower(upper(lower(upper(b)))) = lower(upper(b))

goal: is_galois_insertion[A, B](lower, upper) = (is_galois_connection[A, B](lower, upper) and forall(x0: B) { lower(upper(x0)) = x0 })
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { (is_galois_connection[T0, T1](x0, x1) and forall(x2: T1) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 }) = is_galois_insertion[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[A, B](lower, upper)

goal: is_galois_coinsertion[A, B](lower, upper) = (is_galois_connection[A, B](lower, upper) and forall(x0: A) { upper(lower(x0)) = x0 })
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { (is_galois_connection[T0, T1](x0, x1) and forall(x2: T0) { x1(x0(x2)) = x2 }) = is_galois_coinsertion[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[A, B](lower, upper)

goal: is_galois_insertion[A, B](lower, upper) = (is_galois_connection[A, B](lower, upper) and forall(x0: B) { lower(upper(x0)) = x0 })
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { (is_galois_connection[T0, T1](x0, x1) and forall(x2: T1) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 }) = is_galois_insertion[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[A, B](lower, upper)
is_galois_connection[A, B](lower, upper) and forall(x0: B) { lower(upper(x0)) = x0 }
function(x0: B) { lower(upper(x0)) = x0 }(b)

goal: is_galois_coinsertion[A, B](lower, upper) = (is_galois_connection[A, B](lower, upper) and forall(x0: A) { upper(lower(x0)) = x0 })
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { (is_galois_connection[T0, T1](x0, x1) and forall(x2: T0) { x1(x0(x2)) = x2 }) = is_galois_coinsertion[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[A, B](lower, upper)
is_galois_connection[A, B](lower, upper) and forall(x0: A) { upper(lower(x0)) = x0 }
function(x0: A) { upper(lower(x0)) = x0 }(a)
